evidenceInventory.evidence: database backup sha256 is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: database backup sha256 as sha256:<64 hex> or documented redacted root-only source

evidenceInventory.evidence: uploads backup sha256 is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: uploads backup sha256 as sha256:<64 hex> or documented redacted root-only source

evidenceInventory.evidence: production env backup sha256 is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: production env backup sha256 as sha256:<64 hex> or documented redacted root-only source

evidenceInventory.evidence: release evidence bundle hash is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: release evidence bundle hash as sha256:<64 hex> or documented redacted root-only source

evidenceInventory.evidence: attachment reconciliation CSV path is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: attachment reconciliation CSV path as a redacted repository or evidence-bundle path

evidenceInventory.evidence: attachment reconciliation CSV sha256 is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: attachment reconciliation CSV sha256 as sha256:<64 hex>

evidenceInventory.evidence: attachment reconciliation summary path is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: attachment reconciliation summary path as a redacted repository or evidence-bundle path

evidenceInventory.evidence: attachment reconciliation summary hash is present as metadata
requiredEvidence: attachment reconciliation summary hash as sha256:<64 hex>
attachmentReconciliationStatus=pass or mismatch bound in releaseEvidenceBundleHash

evidenceInventory.evidence: compose config backup reference is recorded as root-only and not copied into repository evidence
requiredEvidence: compose config backup reference redacted path or root-only update-record pointer

evidenceInventory.evidence: Nginx config backup reference is recorded as root-only and not copied into repository evidence
requiredEvidence: Nginx config backup reference redacted path or root-only update-record pointer

evidenceInventory.evidence: database restore dry-run result record not supplied
requiredEvidence: redacted restore drill record with databaseRestoreResult=pass or not-applicable

evidenceInventory.evidence: uploads restore dry-run result record not supplied
requiredEvidence: redacted restore drill record with uploadsRestoreResult=pass or not-applicable

evidenceInventory.evidence: attachment metadata/file integrity result record not supplied
requiredEvidence: redacted restore drill record with attachmentHashMatched=pass or not-applicable

evidenceInventory.evidence: rollback target version and immutable image digest are recorded
requiredEvidence: rollbackTargetVersion
rollbackTargetImage with image@sha256

blockingGaps.safeEvidence: compose config backup reference is recorded as root-only and not copied into repository evidence
requiredEvidence: compose config backup reference redacted path or root-only update-record pointer

blockingGaps.safeEvidence: Nginx config backup reference is recorded as root-only and not copied into repository evidence
requiredEvidence: Nginx config backup reference redacted path or root-only update-record pointer

blockingGaps.safeEvidence: database restore dry-run result record not supplied
requiredEvidence: redacted restore drill record with databaseRestoreResult=pass or not-applicable

blockingGaps.safeEvidence: uploads restore dry-run result record not supplied
requiredEvidence: redacted restore drill record with uploadsRestoreResult=pass or not-applicable

blockingGaps.safeEvidence: attachment metadata/file integrity result record not supplied
requiredEvidence: redacted restore drill record with attachmentHashMatched=pass or not-applicable

restoreDryRun.evidence: restore dry-run metadata is not supplied; preview remains inventory-only

canClaim: backup and restore evidence metadata has been inventoried
root-only backup hash gaps are explicit
restore dry-run record presence is classified
cannotClaim: database dump or upload archive was read

doesNotProve: database dump integrity beyond supplied metadata
upload archive integrity beyond supplied metadata
release evidence bundle integrity beyond supplied metadata
